scripts.clean: turbo run clean && node scripts/clean.mjs node_modules
scripts.orchestrator:dev: turbo run build --filter=@harness-engineering/cli... && export HARNESS_PROJECT_PATH="$PWD" && concurrently --names orch,dash --prefix-colors blue,green "node packages/cli/dist/bin/harness.js orchestrator run --headless" "pnpm --filter @harness-engineering/dashboard dev"
scripts.generate:plugin:all: pnpm generate:plugin:claude && pnpm generate:plugin:cursor && pnpm generate:plugin:gemini && pnpm generate:plugin:codex
scripts.generate:plugin:check: node scripts/generate-plugin.mjs --target claude --check && node scripts/generate-plugin.mjs --target cursor --check && node scripts/generate-plugin.mjs --target gemini --check && node scripts/generate-plugin.mjs --target codex --check

auditExceptions.GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99: esbuild dev-server CORS — dev-only, no network exposure. Blocked by vitepress ^5 pin.
auditExceptions.GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9: vite .map path traversal — dev-only, no --host usage. Blocked by vitepress ^5 pin.
auditExceptions.GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf: protobufjs overlong UTF-8 decoding — blocked by @google/genai → protobufjs ^7.5.4 pin. All protobufjs CVEs in this exception list share the same upstream block; track @google/genai release that bumps to protobufjs ^8.
auditExceptions.GHSA-2pr8-phx7-x9h3: protobufjs DoS via crafted field names — blocked by @google/genai pin (see GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf).
auditExceptions.GHSA-66ff-xgx4-vchm: protobufjs code injection via bytes-field defaults — blocked by @google/genai pin. Risk: only exploitable if attacker controls .proto schema; @google/genai consumes Google-published schemas.
auditExceptions.GHSA-fx83-v9x8-x52w: protobufjs prototype injection in generated message constructors — blocked by @google/genai pin (see GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf).
auditExceptions.GHSA-75px-5xx7-5xc7: protobufjs code generation gadget after prototype pollution — blocked by @google/genai pin (see GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf).
auditExceptions.GHSA-jvwf-75h9-cwgg: protobufjs process-wide DoS via unsafe option paths — blocked by @google/genai pin (see GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf).
auditExceptions.GHSA-685m-2w69-288q: protobufjs DoS via unbounded recursion — blocked by @google/genai pin (see GHSA-q6x5-8v7m-xcrf).
